items.value: 一場探索佛教未來的學術盛會
A Symposium Exploring the Future of Buddhism
「慈濟全球共善學思會」此次以「應用佛法與當代菩薩道：前瞻佛教的未來」為題，匯聚來自全球7個國家/地區之佛教學者、宗教實踐者與人文學者，透過學術論文發表、圓桌論壇與沉浸式藝術展體驗，深入探討應用佛教、菩薩道精神與佛教藝術的當代轉譯。本次研討會由慈濟基金會與哈佛大學認知美學媒體實驗室 (CAMLab) 共同主辦，期盼在學術對話中，為佛教的未來開展新的對話、開拓益發寬廣深遠的視野。

The Tzu Chi Global Symposium for Common Goodness will convene under the theme "Applied Buddhism and the Contemporary Bodhisattva Path: Envisioning the Future of Buddhism." This upcoming event will bring together Buddhist scholars, religious practitioners, and humanities experts from seven countries and regions worldwide.

Through academic paper presentations, roundtable discussions, and an immersive exhibition, the forum will explore the contemporary interpretation of applied Buddhism, the spirit of the Bodhisattva Path, and Design Thinking After Buddhism.

Co-organized by the Tzu Chi Foundation and Harvard FAS CAMLab (Cognitive Aesthetic Media Lab), the symposium aims to foster new dialogues and broaden horizons for the future of Buddhism through rigorous academic exchange.

[{"icon":"BookOpen","label":"9場學術論文發表","labelEn":"9 Presentation Sessions"},{"icon":"Lightbulb","label":"3場圓桌論壇對話","labelEn":"3 Roundtable Discussions"},{"icon":"Users","label":"7個國家地區、近50位學者與實踐者","labelEn":"Close to 50 Scholars from 7 countries and regions "},{"icon":"Eye","label":"明心之旅沉浸式展覽","labelEn":"Journey to Enlightenment Immersive Exhibition"}]

《明心之旅沉浸式展覽：佛教文化遺產多媒體展》將於三個國際場館展出。本展覽邀請觀眾透過沉浸式媒體與公共活動，深入體驗佛教的歷史、哲學與當代實踐。

誠摯邀請您持續關注哈佛大學 CAMLab 與慈濟基金會發布的最新資訊，與我們一同踏上這趟跨文化之旅——從古老的覺悟聖地，走向當代慈悲的具體實踐。

更多資訊請見：
https://60immex.tzuchi.org.tw/

Journey to Enlightenment: A Multimedia Exhibition on Buddhist Cultural Heritage unfolds across three international venues, inviting audiences to engage with Buddhist history, philosophy, and contemporary practice through immersive media and public programming.

We invite visitors to follow updates from both CAMLab and the Tzu Chi Foundation for the latest information, and to join us in this cross-cultural journey—from ancient sites of awakening to contemporary expressions of compassion in action.

For more information:
https://camlab.fas.harvard.edu/exhibition/journey-to-enlightenment/

來自世界各地的傑出學者與實踐者，共同分享佛教的當代智慧與願景。
Distinguished scholars and practitioners from around the world, sharing contemporary Buddhist wisdom and vision.
Tzu Chi Global Symposium for Common Goodness
